name: Sports Venues of Florida, Inc.
summary: Sports Venues of Florida, Inc., a development stage company, owns, develops, and operates venues for youth and adult team sports. It is also involved in the sponsoring such teams; and providing training programs for such team sports, as well as in related activities. The company was formerly known as Big Three Restaurants, Inc. and changed its name to Sports Venues of Florida, Inc. in May 2014. Sports Venues of Florida, Inc. is based in Lithia, Florida.
